tips: Use CSS custom properties (--variable) for consistent theming
Flexbox and Grid handle most layout needs without floats or hacks
Use media queries for responsive designs that adapt to any screen size
CSS nesting reduces repetition in modern stylesheets
Use container queries to style elements based on parent size, not viewport
The :has() selector lets you style a parent based on its children
Use logical properties (margin-inline, padding-block) for RTL support
Prefer rem units over px for scalable, accessible typography
CSS animations are more performant than JavaScript-driven animations
Use will-change to hint at elements that will animate for smoother rendering
Dark mode is easy with prefers-color-scheme media query
Layer imports with @layer to control cascade without specificity wars
